## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Build branded error pages for common HTTP/status scenarios
- Add recovery actions (back home, retry, contact support)
- Use mock error routing/triggers for testing
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Distinct page title and recovery actions per status type
  - Primary recovery action above secondary action on mobile
  - Error illustrations/icons optional but consistent style

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] 401/403/404/500 pages implemented
- [ ] Mock triggers route to each error page
- [ ] Recovery actions function correctly
- [ ] PR includes screenshots for all error pages

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `page-design`, `error-handling`, `priority-medium`
